name: Examples as proof
description: treating many examples as proof of a universal claim
diagnostic_signal: student says checked cases prove all cases
intervention: introduce counterexample logic and quantifier negation

name: Domain omission
diagnostic_signal: student applies method outside allowed domain

name: Answer-only reasoning
description: reporting result without interpretation or verification
diagnostic_signal: student gives number but no meaning
intervention: add residual checks and explanation prompts

name: Symbol manipulation without meaning
description: performing algebraic moves without equivalence awareness
diagnostic_signal: extraneous solution or invalid operation appears
intervention: teach transformation validity and substitution checks

name: Uncritical tool trust
description: accepting calculator AI or CAS output without review
diagnostic_signal: student cannot explain or verify output
